name: cc-launcher
description: Production-ready cc-switch backed launcher for Codex and Claude CLI workflows

scripts.release:patch: npm test && npm version patch -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin master --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm test && npm version minor -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin master --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm test && npm version major -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin master --follow-tags
